slots.problem: Opponents conceding position before you attack

questions.text: My top pins — Opponents conceding position before you attack
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; observable-event version of 'heavy pressure' — partner concedes without requiring an attack (Appendix B 'intense relaxed pressure' note); style-aligned to Gerald's 2026-07-20 pass

questions.text: In my last 10 transitions between dominant positions, my partner recovered guard before I settled the new position
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; observable-event version of 'flow/connection' — partner interruption rate during transitions (Appendix B 'flow → partner doesn't recover guard mid-transition'); scored inverted — higher frequency is worse (flags: inverted)

slots.problem: Framing, breathing, and planning before they attack

questions.text: Their dominant position — Framing, breathing, and planning before they attack

questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; late-stage escape — surviving a near-finish, distinct from early defense; style-aligned to Gerald's 2026-07-20 pass
